name: @backstage/remove-mui-dependencies
description: MUI 4 to BUI: Remove unused @material-ui/* dependencies from package.json

scripts.test: yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/codemod.ts ./tests && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l json ./scripts/package-json-codemod.ts ./tests && yarn exec codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
